notes:
# Steady 2.19.1

## Notifications
- **QuietWatch / Web filter status hidden by default** — no more persistent Steady service noise
- Website “Hide Steady notifications” defaults **on**; phone no longer overwrites a mute with “show”
- Silent notification channels for enforcement + DNS filter; refresh when policy changes

## Apps
- New **System** category: mark an app as untouchable — always works, never locked or grayed
- Available in Categories on the phone and on the parent website (System button)
- Kid app inventory now includes **system / OS packages** so the website lists everything

## Notes
- Android still requires a foreground-service notification for VPN/protection; with hide on it uses a blank, importance-none channel so it stays out of the shade on stock Android
